tracks.description:
Мөнхийн тал нутгийн дуу — A journey across the eternal Mongolian steppe through the ancient art of khoomei throat singing and the haunting morin khuur (horsehead fiddle).

Монгол нутгийн уудам тал, хөх тэнгэрийн дор хөөмийн аялгуу.

UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage — Khoomei (Mongolian throat singing) has been practiced by nomadic herders for centuries across the vast grasslands of Central Asia.
